zh.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald於大約1453年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素。她於大約1470年與John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1527年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德納姆昌享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald于大约1453年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素。她于大约1470年与John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1527年在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德納姆昌享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Marietta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Maria , now occasionally used as a given name in the English-speaking world. In Gaelic Scotland Mar(i)etta is sometimes found as an Anglicized form of Mairead, the Gaelic equivalent of Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald was born about 1453, in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Ireland. She married John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan about 1470, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1527, in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald est née environ 1453, à Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlande. Elle a épousé John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan environ 1470, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1527, à Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald wurde um 1453 in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irland geboren. Sie hat um 1470 in Scotland John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1527 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald è nata il circa 1453 nel Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda. Lei sposato John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan circa 1470, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1527, nel Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonaldは約1453年にアイルランドコウントイ ダウンヒルスボロウ カストルで生まれた。約1470年にスコットランドでJohn  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1527年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドナムルチャンで75歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald(은)는 대략 1453년 아일랜드 카운티 다운 힐스버루 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 스컷랜드에서 John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 스컷랜드 아그이 아드남르챈에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald nasceu aproximadamente 1453, em Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda. Ela casou-se com John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan aproximadamente 1470, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1527, em Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald родилась около 1453 г. в местности хиллсбороую кастл, коунти доун, Ирландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan около 1470 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1527 г. в местности арднамурчань, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Marietta MacDonald nació aproximadamente 1453, en Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda. Se casó con John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan aproximadamente 1470, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1527, en Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
